The '''attack on Toryaz Station''' occurred during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], orchestrated by [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lady]] [[Lumiya]] and [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]]. It saw the death of [[Aidel Saxan]], the [[Five World Prime Minister]].

==Prelude==
The attack was an assassination attempt on the political leaders of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], an attempt that would strain the relationship between the Galactic Alliance and Corellia during the Second Galactic Civil War. The [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] chose to reopen negotiations in a neutral setting, following [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Matric Klauskin]]'s capture of [[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]]. Before hostilities escalated further [[Cal Omas]], [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Skywalker]], [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] and [[Cha Niathal]] devised a plan in which the Alliance would be able to negotiate a withdrawal from Tralus, allowing both the Corellian state and the Alliance to save face and end the conflict. However certain parties had no wish for matters to end peacefully.<ref name="Betrayal" />

The location chosen was [[Toryaz Station]], an [[Kuat/Legends|Kuati]] orbital station commonly used for interplanetary negotiations. A large area of the station was cleared, and made safe. On the first evening, following long talks, a dance took place. Afterward, the guests retired to their respective rooms. [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] Pellaeon was representing the Alliance, and Prime Minister Aidel Saxan represented the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]. Master Skywalker and a contingent of Jedi were also present, along with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Solo]].<ref name="Betrayal" />

==The attack==
After the first day of negotiations, [[Lumiya]] arrived disguised as a Kuati mercantile princess with a team of drugged commandos provided by Sal-Solo. Using her powers, she convinced [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Siron Tawaler]] to provide navigation details to the delegation's chambers, and then promptly disposed of Tawaler by influencing him into stepping through an airlock. The rabid commandos struck at each delegation, and succeeded in killing Prime Minister Saxan. Pellaeon's double was also killed, but not the Supreme Commander himself, as he had changed quarters without informing the operators of Toryaz Station. Through the combative skill of those present, more possible casualties were prevented, although several security operatives were killed. Every commando died during the mission; some at the hands of the Jedi, others due to the terminal illnesses they had.<ref name="Betrayal" />

==Aftermath==
The talks were a failure; Aidel Saxan's former husband [[Denjax Teppler]] stepped in to replace her, fully aware that he would not last long in the position. The only clues to the forces which had masterminded the assassination were the frozen body of Captain Tawaler, and a [[Lorrd Artifact|piece of cloth]] representing a variety of [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-based cultures, including the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], planted presumably by Lumiya in a successful attempt to lure [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] to her [[The Home|home]].<ref name="Betrayal" />
